content_en:
BIBLIOGRAPHY al-'Asqalani, Ibn Bajar, and Muhammad ibn Isma'il al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari. Fatb al-Bari bi Sharb Sabib al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari. Edited by Muham­ mad Fu'ad 'Abd al-Baqi and Muhibb al-Din al-Khatib. I 4 vols. Cairo: Maktabat al-Salafiyya, I 3 90 AHII970 CE. al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari, Muhammad ibn Isma'il. Sabib al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari. Hadith numbering according to Fatb al-Bari. --. Al-Adab al-Mufrad. Edited by Mubammad Fu'ad 'Abd al-Baqi. 3rd edition. Beirut: Dar al-Basha'ir al-Islamiyya, I989 CE. al-Darami, 'Abdallah. Al-Musnad al-Jami'. Dar al-Fikr, I978 CE. al-Dhahabi, Muhammad ibn Ahmad. Miziin al-I'tidiil fi Naqd al-Rijiil. 4 vols. Reprint. Beirut: Dar al-Ma'rifa, n.d. --. Tadhkirat a/-Jjuffai. 4 vols in 2. Beirut: Dar al-Ma'rifa, n.d. al-Ghazali, Abu Bamid. Ihya' 'Ulum al-Din. 4 vols. Cairo: Lajna Nashr al-Thaqafa al-Islamiyya, I93 5 CE. al-Baddad, 'Alawi ibn Ahmad. Misbab al-Aniim wa ]ala' a/­ Ta/am fi Radd Shubh al-Bid'i al-Najdi Allati Adi/a biha al-'Awwiim. Translated as Refutation Of The Innovator of Najd by Gibril Fouad Baddad. Damascus: Maktabat al-Ahbab, I422 AH I 2002 CE. al-Bakim, Abu 'Abdallah. Al-Mustadrak 'ala al-Sabibayn. 4 vols. Hyderabad, I 3 3 4 AH I I 9 I 6 CE. Reprint (with index vol 5 ) . Beirut: Dar al-Ma'rifa, n.d. al-Haythami, Ibn Bajar. Majma' al-Zawii'id. Beirut: Dar al­ Kitab al'Arabi, I 967 CE.

BIBLIOGRAPHY Ibo 'Abidln, Muhammad Amin. Radd al-Mubtiir 'aid al-Durr al-Mukhtar. 5 vols. Bu lag 1 272 AH I 1 8 5 5 CE. Reprint. Beirut: Dar Ihya' al-Turath al-'Arabi, 1 407 AH I 1987 CE. Ibo I:Ianbal, Ahmad. Al-Musnad. 6 vols. Cairo: Mu'assasa Qurtuba, n.d. Reprint. Beirut: Dar I hya' al-Turath al­ 'Arabi, n.d. Ibo Majah, Muhammad. Sunan Ibn Miijah. Edited by Fu'ad 'Abd al-Bagi. 2 vols. Beirut: Dar al-Fikr, n.d. al-Kasani, Abu Bakr ibn Mansur. Badii'i' al-Sand'i' fi Tartib al­ Shard'i'. Edited by 'Adnan Darawish. 6 vols. Beirut: Dar Ihya' al-Turath al'Arabi, 1 4 1 9 AH I 1 998 CE. al-Magdisi, Abu 'Abdallah Muhammad ibn Muflih. Al-Adabal­ Shar'iyya. Editors: Shu'ayb al-Arna'iit and 'Umar al-Qa­ yyam. 4 vols. 3rd edition. Beirut: Mu'assisa al-Risala, 1 4 1 8 AH / 1997 CE. Muhammad ibn 'Allan, Abii Zakariyya Yahya ibn Sharaf al­ Nawawl. Al-Futubiit al-Rabbiiniyya 'aid al-Adhkiir al­ Nawawiyya. 5 vols. in 3 . Reprint. Beirut: Dar al-Ihya' Ii al-Turath al-'Arabi, n.d. Muslim ibn al-I:Iajjaj. Sabib Muslim. Edited by Muhammad Fu'ad 'Abd al-Bagi. s vols. Cairo: Matba'a 'Isa al-Babi al-I:Ialabi 1 3 76 AH / 1 9 5 6 CE. Reprint. Beirut: Dar al-Fikr, 1403 AH I 1983 CE. al-Nasa'I, Abu 'Abd al-Rahman Ahmad. Al-Sunan al-Kubrd. Beirut: Dar Ihya' al-Turath al- 'Arabi, n.d. Nasif, Mansur 'AIL Ghayat al-Ma'mul Sharb al-Taj al-Jami' Ii-I-Usu/ fi Abadith al-Rasul. 5 vols. Reprint [index in 6th vol]. Beirut: Dar Ibya' al-Turath al-'Arabi, 1 4 1 3 AH I 1 993 CE. --. Irshiid Tu/db al-Haqd'iq ilii Ma'rifat Sunan Khayr al­ Khalii'iq. Edited by Dr. Niir al-Din 'Itr. md edition. Beirut: Dar al-Basha'ir al-Islamiya , 1 4 n AH I 1991 CE. --. Al-Tibydn fi Adah Hamalat al-Qur'dn. Edited by 'Abd al-Qadir alArna'iit. 20d edition. Damascus: Dar al-Bayan, 1 4 1 4 AH f 1 994 CE.

ETIQUETTE WITH THE QURAN --. Al-Tibyan fi Adah Jjamalat al-Quran. Edited by by Bashir Muhammad 'Uyun. Third edition. Damascus: Maktabat Dar al-Bayan, 1421 AH I 2000 CE. --. Al-Tibyan fi Adah Jjamalat al-Quran. Edited by Ghalib Karim. Damascus, 1422 AH I 200 1 CE. --. Al-Tibyan fi Adah Jjamalat al-Quran. Edited by Khalid Khadim al-Saruji. Damascus: Dar Ibn al-Qayyim, 1422 AH /2001 CE. --. Kitab al-Tarkhi$ fi al-Ikram bi'l-Qiyam Li Dhawi al-Falwa al-Maziyya min AHL al-Islam 'ala Jihat al-Birr wa al­ Taqwa wa al-Ibtiram la 'ala Jihat al-Riya' wa al-I'zam. Beirut: Dar al-Basha'ir al-Islamiyya, 1409 AH I 1988 CE. al-Qari, 'All ibn Sultan Muhammad al-HarawL Fatb Bab al-'In­ aya bi Sharb al-Nuqaya. Edited by Muhammad and Hay­ tham NaՍar Tamim. 3 vols. Beirut: Dar al-Qalam, 1 4 1 7 AH / 1 997 CE. al-Sajistani, Abu Dawud. Sunan Abi Dawud. Edited by Muham­ mad Muhyi al-Din 'Abd al-l::lamid. 4 vols. in 2. Beirut: Dar al-Fikr, n.d. al-San'anl, 'Abd al-Razzaq. Al-Mu$annaf. Edited by Jjabib al­ Rabman al-/\zam. Beirut: al-Maktab al-Islam, 1 403 AH I 1983 CE. al-Shahrastani, 'Abd al-Karim. Kitab al-Mila/ wa al-Nihal. Print­ ed in the margins of Ibn I:Iazm's Kitab al-Fa$l fi al-Mila/ wa al-Ahwa' wa al-Nihal. 5 vols. in 3 . Baghdad: Maktabat al-Muthanna, n.d. al-Sharbini, Muhammad Khatib. Mughni al-Mubtaj ila Ma'rifat Ma'ani Alfaz al-Minhaj. Beirut: Dar al-Fikr: n.d. Shihab al-Din, Ahmad ibn 'All ibn l::lajar. Taqrib al-Tahdhib. Edited by Muhammad 'Awwama. Beirut: Dar Ibn I:Iazm, 1 4 20 AH / 1 999 CE. Siraj al-Din, 'Abdallah. Tilawat al-Quran al-Majid, Faa'iluha, Adabuha, Kha$a'i$uha. 4th edition. Aleppo: Dar al-Falah, 1 4 1 8 AH / 1 997 CE. al-Shafaqa, Muhammad Bashir. Fiqh al-'Ibadat. 3rd edition. Damascus: Dar al-Qalam, 1 4 1 2 AH I 1992 CE.

BIBLIOGRAPHY al-Suyutl, Jalal al-Din 'Abd al-Rahman. Al-Itqtin fi 'Ulum al­ Qur'tin. Edited by Muhammad Abu al-Fallbrahlm. 4 vols. in 2. Iranian reprint of an Egyptian edition. n.d. al-Tirmidhi, Abu 'isa. Sunan al-Tirmidhi. Edited by Muhammad Fu'ad 'Abd al-BaqL 5 vols. Cairo, n.d. Reprint. Beirut: Dar Ibya' al-Turath al-'Arabi, n.d. I93
content_id:
Berikut adalah daftar referensi yang digunakan dalam penyusunan buku ini:

Al-'Asqalani, Ibn Hajar, dan Muhammad ibn Isma'il al-Bukhari. Fath al-Bari bi Syarh Shahih al-Bukhari. Diedit oleh Muhammad Fu'ad 'Abd al-Baqi dan Muhibb al-Din al-Khatib. 14 jilid. Kairo: Maktabat al-Salafiyya, 1390 H/1970 M.

Al-Bukhari, Muhammad ibn Isma'il. Shahih al-Bukhari. Penomoran hadis mengikuti Fath al-Bari.

Al-Bukhari, Muhammad ibn Isma'il. Al-Adab al-Mufrad. Diedit oleh Muhammad Fu'ad 'Abd al-Baqi. Edisi ke-3. Beirut: Dar al-Basya'ir al-Islamiyyah, 1989 M.

Al-Darami, 'Abdullah. Al-Musnad al-Jami'. Dar al-Fikr, 1978 M.

Al-Dzahabi, Muhammad ibn Ahmad. Mizan al-I'tidal fi Naqd al-Rijal. 4 jilid. Cetakan ulang. Beirut: Dar al-Ma'rifah, t.t.

Al-Dzahabi, Muhammad ibn Ahmad. Tadzkirat al-Huffazh. 4 jilid dalam 2. Beirut: Dar al-Ma'rifah, t.t.

Al-Ghazali, Abu Hamid. Ihya' 'Ulum al-Din. 4 jilid. Kairo: Lajnah Nasyr al-Tsaqafah al-Islamiyyah, 1935 M.

Al-Haddad, 'Alawi ibn Ahmad. Misbah al-Anam wa Jala' al-Zalam fi Radd Syubah al-Bid'i al-Najdi Allati Adlal biha al-'Awwam. Diterjemahkan dengan judul Refutation of the Innovator of Najd oleh Gibril Fouad Haddad. Damaskus: Maktabat al-Ahbab, 1422 H/2002 M.

Al-Hakim, Abu 'Abdullah. Al-Mustadrak 'ala al-Shahihayn. 4 jilid. Hyderabad, 1334 H/1916 M. Cetakan ulang (dengan jilid indeks ke-5). Beirut: Dar al-Ma'rifah, t.t.

Al-Haitsami, Ibn Hajar. Majma' al-Zawa'id. Beirut: Dar al-Kitab al-'Arabi, 1967 M.

Ibn 'Abidin, Muhammad Amin. Radd al-Mukhtar 'ala al-Durr al-Mukhtar. 5 jilid. Bulaq, 1272 H/1855 M. Cetakan ulang. Beirut: Dar Ihya' al-Turats al-'Arabi, 1407 H/1987 M.

Ibn Hanbal, Ahmad. Al-Musnad. 6 jilid. Kairo: Mu'assasah Qurtubah, t.t. Cetakan ulang. Beirut: Dar Ihya' al-Turats al-'Arabi, t.t.

Ibn Majah, Muhammad. Sunan Ibn Majah. Diedit oleh Fu'ad 'Abd al-Baqi. 2 jilid. Beirut: Dar al-Fikr, t.t.

Al-Kasani, Abu Bakr ibn Mansur. Bada'i' al-Shana'i' fi Tartib al-Syara'i'. Diedit oleh 'Adnan Darawisy. 6 jilid. Beirut: Dar Ihya' al-Turats al-'Arabi, 1419 H/1998 M.

Al-Maqdisi, Abu 'Abdullah Muhammad ibn Muflih. Al-Adab al-Syar'iyyah. Diedit oleh Syu'ayb al-Arna'uth dan 'Umar al-Qayyam. 4 jilid. Edisi ke-3. Beirut: Mu'assasah al-Risalah, 1418 H/1997 M.

Muhammad ibn 'Allan, Abu Zakariyya Yahya ibn Syaraf al-Nawawi. Al-Futuhat al-Rabbaniyyah 'ala al-Adzkar al-Nawawiyyah. 5 jilid dalam 3. Cetakan ulang. Beirut: Dar al-Ihya' lil-Turats al-'Arabi, t.t.

Muslim ibn al-Hajjaj. Shahih Muslim. Diedit oleh Muhammad Fu'ad 'Abd al-Baqi. 5 jilid. Kairo: Mathba'ah 'Isa al-Babi al-Halabi, 1376 H/1956 M. Cetakan ulang. Beirut: Dar al-Fikr, 1403 H/1983 M.

Al-Nasa'i, Abu 'Abd al-Rahman Ahmad. Al-Sunan al-Kubra. Beirut: Dar Ihya' al-Turats al-'Arabi, t.t.

Nasif, Manshur 'Ali. Ghayat al-Ma'mul Syarh al-Taj al-Jami' lil-Ushul fi Ahadits al-Rasul. 5 jilid. Cetakan ulang [indeks dalam jilid ke-6]. Beirut: Dar Ihya' al-Turats al-'Arabi, 1413 H/1993 M.

Al-Nawawi, Abu Zakariyya Yahya ibn Syaraf. Irsyad Thullab al-Haqa'iq ila Ma'rifat Sunan Khayr al-Khala'iq. Diedit oleh Dr. Nur al-Din 'Itr. Edisi ke-2. Beirut: Dar al-Basya'ir al-Islamiyyah, 1411 H/1991 M.

Al-Nawawi, Abu Zakariyya Yahya ibn Syaraf. Al-Tibyan fi Adab Hamalat al-Qur'an. Diedit oleh 'Abd al-Qadir al-Arna'uth. Edisi ke-2. Damaskus: Dar al-Bayan, 1414 H/1994 M. [Juga edisi lain: diedit oleh Basyir Muhammad 'Uyun, edisi ke-3, Damaskus: Maktabat Dar al-Bayan, 1421 H/2000 M; diedit oleh Ghalib Karim, Damaskus, 1422 H/2001 M; diedit oleh Khalid Khadim al-Saruji, Damaskus: Dar Ibn al-Qayyim, 1422 H/2001 M.]

Al-Nawawi, Abu Zakariyya Yahya ibn Syaraf. Kitab al-Tarkhish fi al-Ikram bil-Qiyam li Dzawi al-Fadhl al-Maziyyah min Ahl al-Islam 'ala Jihah al-Birr wal-Taqwa wal-Ihtram. Beirut: Dar al-Basya'ir al-Islamiyyah, 1409 H/1988 M.

Al-Qari, 'Ali ibn Sultan Muhammad al-Harawi. Fath Bab al-'Inayah bi Syarh al-Nuqayah. Diedit oleh Muhammad dan Haitsam Nadzar Tamim. 3 jilid. Beirut: Dar al-Qalam, 1417 H/1997 M.

Al-Sajistani, Abu Dawud. Sunan Abi Dawud. Diedit oleh Muhammad Muhyi al-Din 'Abd al-Hamid. 4 jilid dalam 2. Beirut: Dar al-Fikr, t.t.

Al-Shan'ani, 'Abd al-Razzaq. Al-Mushannaf. Diedit oleh Habib al-Rahman al-A'zhami. Beirut: al-Maktab al-Islami, 1403 H/1983 M.

Al-Syahrastani, 'Abd al-Karim. Kitab al-Milal wal-Nihal. Dicetak di pinggiran Kitab al-Fashl fi al-Milal wal-Ahwa' wal-Nihal karya Ibn Hazm. 5 jilid dalam 3. Baghdad: Maktabat al-Mutsanna, t.t.

Al-Syarbini, Muhammad Khatib. Mughni al-Muhtaj ila Ma'rifat Ma'ani Alfazh al-Minhaj. Beirut: Dar al-Fikr, t.t.

Syihab al-Din, Ahmad ibn 'Ali ibn Hajar. Taqrib al-Tahdzib. Diedit oleh Muhammad 'Awwamah. Beirut: Dar Ibn Hazm, 1420 H/1999 M.

Siraj al-Din, 'Abdullah. Tilawat al-Qur'an al-Majid, Fada'iluha, Adabuha, Khasha'ishuha. Edisi ke-4. Aleppo: Dar al-Falah, 1418 H/1997 M.

Al-Syafaqa, Muhammad Basyir. Fiqh al-'Ibadat. Edisi ke-3. Damaskus: Dar al-Qalam, 1412 H/1992 M.

Al-Suyuthi, Jalal al-Din 'Abd al-Rahman. Al-Itqan fi 'Ulum al-Qur'an. Diedit oleh Muhammad Abu al-Fadhl Ibrahim. 4 jilid dalam 2. Cetakan ulang Iran dari edisi Mesir, t.t.

Al-Tirmidzi, Abu 'Isa. Sunan al-Tirmidzi. Diedit oleh Muhammad Fu'ad 'Abd al-Baqi. 5 jilid. Kairo, t.t. Cetakan ulang. Beirut: Dar Ihya' al-Turats al-'Arabi, t.t.
